      At your next Possibility Team meeting, report back on what you Noticed about the efforts you made to stay in - or return to - Experiential Reality. What did you learn? What did you see?

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.01 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      SKILL UP WITH PRACTICING RADICALLY NEUTRAL SELF OBSERVATION FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.02

      Propose to your Possibility Team that, in order to prepare yourselves for entering Radical Reality, you all begin together the ongoing Practice of Self Observation. Study the entire Self Observation website and discuss the ideas there until everyone is clear about how Self Observation goes and the Purpose and Value of this Practice. Then begin Self Observation during the Possibility Team meeting for 20 minutes of ordinary interactions. Then stop and report to everyone what each person Notices, but continue the Self Observation while people report. Be sure everyone knows that Self Observation is Radically Neutral Self Observation, observing yourself with no judgments, cricicisms, comparisons, or stories attached - NONE AT ALL, EVER! Then continue Self Observation each day for the next 7 days, reporting in during the week, or asking questions of each other in your Possibility Team's Telegram Group. Check in again about your Self Observation at the beginning of your next Possibility Team meeting. Consider the Possibility of continuing your Self Observation Practice fort he rest of your life. It is one of the most effective ways to Build Matrix that we Possibilitators have ever discovered.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.02 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      STUDY THE 'EYE OF THE NEEDLE' WEBSITE FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.03

      Propose to your Possibility Team that, in order to prepare yourselves for entering Radical Reality, you spend one entire meeting reading through and discussing the ideas in the Eye Of The Needle website, its ramifications for society in general, and you in particular. Carry the question with you: "Where am I on the Path right now?" Give each other clear and specific Feedback and Coaching about where each one is on the Path. Then do one or more of the Eye Of The Needle Experiments at this Possibility Team meeting and also during the week. The Purpose of these efforts is to use a new Thoughtmap about your life and its Purpose. The Eye of the Needle map of the Path indicates dead ends and traps, such as 'success', or the 'Handsome Holy Tribal Man' which modern culture does not reveal. It does not matter where your 'X' on the map is. It only matters that your 'X' of where you are on the map is accurate. Because from there you can do healing processes, Take A Stand, StartOver, or begin new Practices that move you in the direction you might want to go. Keep the Eye of the Needle map in your mind and heart all week long. Share it with 3 random people during the week and listen to what they think and feel about the map. Beware that they may have strong thoughts or feelings. Do not take them personally. Let people have whatever thoughts and feelings they want to have about the Eye of the Needle map.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.03 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      DROP AS MUCH BAGGAGE AS YOU CAN IN 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.04

      Come together in your Possibility Team and Propose to debaggage yourselves for this next week. Start at the meeting and each person make a list in your Beep! Book of Baggage you are carrying. Specifically look for the kind of Baggage that would stop you or burden you when trying to enter Radical Reality. Yes, there are Vampires in your life, such as lawns, pools, storage areas full of boxes of your belongings, pets, credit card debts, incomplete agreements that you have not ended, even Past Life Vows that still drag on your heart and Being. But there is also Baggage that keeps you from going 'RADICAL'. These could be Beliefs, staying in one of the 8 Prisons, dreams that you carry from your mother or father, promises you made to carry on the family business, etc. Connect with the others in your Possibility Team to help each other make their list as complete as possible for the moment, then circle each person's top 3 Baggage burdens, and help each person make a plan to take the steps to eliminate at least one of these this week. Work in teams if needed, getting rid of excess belongings, writing letters to change old agreements, confront Beliefs, or identify and question old Assumptions or Expectations. At the beginning of your next Possibility Team meeting, check in about what Baggage you were able to get rid of, and what the effect of that has been. Clearly, getting rid of your Baggage is a Practice that can last for years. The good thing is that, now you have started. You can more easily keep the momentum going.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.04 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      ENTER RADICAL SIMPLICITY FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.05

      In your Possibility Team, Propose to study together the Radical Simplicity website. Use people's questions to deepen the Context of your Possibility Team and more deeply connect. This means to put your personal Purposes regarding Radical Simplicity on the table, as in Poop On The Table, and look at it closely together. The important thing here is to look for what you have in common rather than what you have that separates you. Ask peole to list what you have in common in their Beep! Books, and then engage the idea: "What if we focus on what we have in common and let the rest of our lives fall where they may?"

      This is a powerful and Radically Simple way to work together. It can be an extremely rewarding way of life.

      NOTE: This Experiment is NOT a "My life is simpler than your life!" contest! This Experiment is an investigation into what makes for a rewarding and valuable and inspiring human life outside of the modern culture paradigm of consume, own, have, waste, consume some more. Explore together how Radical Simplicity can feed you at deeper and more profound levels of well being together. Then, for the next 7 days, become more and more Radically Simple, in your life and work and relationships.

      Write and publish online a 3-5 page article about what you are discovering while exploring Radical Simplicity in your life. Read your article at your next Possibility Team meeting.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.05 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      EXPAND YOUR CONSCIOUS ASSHOLE SKILLS FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.06

      In your next Possibility Team meeting, study the Asshole Training website together, discussing the ideas and what they could mean in your life. Read the articles slowly and carefully, questioning every word. So many people have been 'civilized'. So many people still try to survive by Being Adaptive, being a 'nice girl' or a 'good boy'. It is killing them, both literally and figuratively. Asshole Training is successful when being a Conscious Asshole has become an Identity Shift option for you at any moment in every situation. For the next 7 days, be a Conscious Asshole by leaving your ordinary Box behind and let Archetypal forces of nature such as your Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage move through you to do their work in the world.

      As you grow more familiar with Navigating Archetypal Spaces, it could be that you prefer to never leave the option of being a Conscious Asshole behind. You could become a Conscious Asshole for the rest of your life. This is how your Dragon can speak, your Mission can be accomlished, and you can make the world a better place for life on Earth. There are so many unconscious assholes holding false positions of power in politics, economics, business, military, and religion... who is going to stop them? Where are the Conscious Assholes to stand up and say, "No. This stops here. That is not allowed, ever. This gameworld is over!" You might even take on a new and badly needed Archan profession: Gameworld Demolition. Report back in your next Possibility Team about the new intimacy territories you were able to create through being a Conscious Asshole.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.06 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      RADICALLY SAY WHAT YOU WANT AND WHAT YOU DON'T WANT FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.07

      Now that you can be a Conscious Asshole, you are certainly bold enough to start admitting to yourself and also saying to other people what you want.

      But... how do you know what you want?

      How do you know which 'I' is doing the 'wanting'? Is it your Box? Your mother? Your Gremlin? Your Past Life Vow? Your Beliefs?

      In your next Possibility Team meeting, study the Say What You Want website together, discussing the ideas and what they could mean in your life. Write down in your Beep! Book what you want and what you do not want. Also write which 'I' is doing the wanting and the not wanting.

      Compare lists with the others in your Team. Find out which wants come from the Being, from the Bright Principles, from E.C.C.O., and from the Archetypal Lineages. Perhaps there are hidden projects or Gameworlds that were not identified before because people never dared to admit or say out loud to others what they truly want.

      Then during the week, 13 times each day, Radically say what you want and what you don't want. Tell it to friends, neighbors, colleagues, bosses, clients, and strangers. Say it in such as way that it is an admission, not a command. What you want is about you, not about other people giving you what you want, or stopping doing something that irritates your Box. At your next Possibility Team meeting, report about what happened as you said want you want and what you don't want. Each person should make a statement about who you have become now.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.07 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      PRACTICE RADICAL HONESTY IN YOUR RELATING WITH YOURSELF AND OTHERS FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.08

      In your next Possibility Team meeting, study the Radical Honesty website together, discussing the ideas and what they could mean in your life. The term 'Radical Honesty' comes from the title of the book Radical Honesty: how to transform your life by telling the truth, by Brad Blanton. Investigate how Radical Honesty starts with you being Radically Honest about what you want and what you do not want.

      In your meeting, break out into groups of 3, with one person being the Client who interacts with the Possibility who is practicing Radical Honesty, and the third person is the Coach who coaches the Possibilitator about their level of authenticity in their Radical Honesty.

      Then for the next 7 days, practice being Radically Honest at home and at work. Ask for people to give you Radically Honest Feedback and Coaching about the value they perceive in your practice of Radical Honesty with them. Be sure to get out your Beep! Book and write down what they tell you about what works and what does not work regarding your Radical Honesty skills, and also ask them to tell you anything you could try next time that would make your Radical Honesty even more valuable. Report back to your Possibility Team by reading them the Feedback and Coaching your received during the week at your next meeting.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.08 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      STOP EVERYTHING... EVERYTHING - AT LEAST FOR A MOMENT - AND HIT BOTTOM FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.09

      It does NOT take much time. It is NOT dramatic. The Bottom has always been there. It will never go away. The Bottom is Reality with no Stories attached. It is what is is, exactly as it is. At the Bottom you are not 'good' and not 'bad'. Neither is anything else. There are no hopes, no dreams, and no curses.

      This Experiment is to Propose to your Possibility Team to Hit Bottom together and experience the Nothingness.

      Be sure to have tissues, towels, and buckets as tools for this journey. Dedicate an hour for this Experiment together. The instructions are to leave the Fantasy Worlds behind by identifying your Fantasy Worlds, and leave your Swamp behind by identifying your Swamp behaviors. Admit each detail to your Team so people see and hear you as you are.

      This is NOT about beating yourself up, at all... not even one tiny bit.

      See and bypass all your maniacal and depressive behaviors behind, and admitting that, actually, there is nothing.

      Hang out there at the Bottom together for the whole meeting. You might get the sense that you do not actually know the other people in your Possibility Team. They are strangers when they are not doing their usual neurotic Survival Strategy show, trying to 'be' something.

      Draw no conclusions.

      It is weird, isn't it?

      Then, for the next 7 days, see how much time you can spend alone and with others on the Bottom... without complaining or explaining about it at all... and also without exhalting yourself. It is what it is, without opinions, interpretations, or meaning. It is even meaningless that it is meaningless.

      Several times during these 7 days at the Bottom, take an energetic snapshot of a scene, with you in the scene, at the Bottom. You are there without reason or cause. You are not on a mission. You are not serving a purpose. You are not even doing an Experiment. Hold these few scenes close to your heart. Consider that for no reason, these might be some of the best moments of your life.

      At your next Possibility Team, share about your moments.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.09 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      RADICALLY RELY ON YOUR ARCHETYPAL RESOURCES FOR INTERACTING WITH THE UNIVERSE FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.10

      Propose at your next Possibility Team meeting to study the Radical Reliance and Infinite Resources websites, reading the sections out loud to each other and questioning everything. Have each person write out their own personal Infinite Resources in their Beep! Book.

      Break out into groups of 4, with 1 peson reading their Infinite Resources from their Beep! Book, and the other three people giving them exact Possibilities for Experiments to try during the next week where they could Radically Rely on their Infinite Resources in their life to make changes or to make new things happen. Spend 15 minutes creating Radical Reliance Experiments for each person. Make sure they write down what you say, not what they think you said. In other words, make sure they know exactly what to do to try the Radical Reliance Experiments you created for them.

      Then for the next 7 days, do each of your Radical Reliance Experiments 3 different times. Make sure to write down notes in your Beep! Book about what you try and the outcomes you create. Read your notes to everyone at your next Possibility Team.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.10 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      ENTER THE ARCHAN DOMAIN OF RADICAL RELATING FOR 1 WEEK

      Matrix Code RADREALI.11

      Now that you have expanded from Verbal Reality into Experiential Reality, now that you can neutrally Observe Yourself, now that you know about the Eye of the Needle and the Path, now that you have become Radically Simplified, now that you have become enough of a Conscious Asshole to Say What You Want and what you do not want, now that you can Hit Bottom and stay there for no Reason, now that you can be Radically Honest and can Radically Rely on your Infinite Resources, you are ready to start Radically Relating.

      Radical Relating is only one component of Archan Relating, which also includes Listening Skills and Speaking Skills, etc., but it is an important component.

      To practice Radical Relating, Propose to your Possibility Team to divide into groups of 3, with one person being the Possibiliator who practices Radical Relating, one person sits across from them and is the Role Player, and the third person sits beside the Possibilitator and is their Coach, saying loudly, "Beep!" quickly followed by what didn't work (which is the Feedback) and what they could try next time to make more Radical Relating (which is the Coaching).

      To begin, the Possibilitator asks the Role Player to shift identitly into being a particular person with whom the Possibilitator would like to Practice Radical Relating, or, the Possibilitator can ask the Role Player to simply be themselves. In either case, go for about 15 minutes per person, with lots of "Go! Beep! Shift! Go!" Rapid Learning. There are so many amazing dimensions of Possibility to explore through Radical Relating. It may be the most entertaining human activity in the world. It is so rewarding because, as soon as you Radically Relate, more Archetypal Love ('Yellow Stuff') flows into the world.

      For the next 7 days after your Possibility Team, practice Radical Relating in your daily life with everyone you meet. Write down your own learnings in your Beep! Book and bring them to your next Possibility Team to support the others to expand their Radical Relating skills.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.11 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      TAKE RADICAL ACTION AS PART OF YOUR RADICAL RELATING WITH THE WORLD IN RADICAL REALITY

      Matrix Code RADREALI.12

      Propose at your next Possibility Team meeting to study the Radical Action StartOver.xyz website. Radical Action is action that does not serve you personally, but instead serves something greater than yourself. This does not mean serving your parents, a corporation, a country, or a religion. These are only gameworlds, human made, for human benefit. No, something 'greater than yourself 'would be Gaia (Gaia is not a gameworld. She is the living Being of planet Earth, created when the General Field of Consciousness intersects the physical matter of Earth.), or your Bright Principles, or E.C.C.O. (Earth Coincidence Control Center), or your Archetypal Lineage, etc.

      Then meet in groups of 4 to make a list of at least 3 Radical Actions each person could take that would feed something greater than them at the same time that it feeds them. Such Radical Actions could range from attending a Town Hall meeting with the Mayor to propose creating a strong 'energy descent plan' for the town, or making a documentary film about where the town's trash actually goes, to choosing a stream or a forest or a mountain or a desert to defend from corporate greed trying to monetize nature for profit at the fastest possible rate to benefit the psychopathic billionaires.

      Then, for the next 7 days, break up into teams of 2 people and perform these actions. Keep it in mind that long supply chains can be broken at any weak point, and that delays and breakdowns destabilize supply chains and end the profitability of wantonly chopping down forests and sending the wood to China for processing.

      Remember the third Rule in Possibility Management: Don't get arrested.

      After 7 days, report back to your Possibility Team about the Radical Actions you took, and the next Radical Actions you are inspired to take.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.12 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      FIND YOUR RADICAL FREEDOM QUOTIENT FOR YOUR AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD INITIATORY PATH

      Matrix Code RADREALI.13

      Your later teen years were to prepare you for your Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, but modern culture did not provide you that option. Instead, you probably stayed in school to 'get a degree so you could get a good job'.

      "Ha! What a load of horseshit!"

      You have been enslaved in a system training you to be a Zombie...

      If you are not already free, how could be of any interest to you to 'take radical responsibility'?

      This Experiment is to Propose to your Possibility Team to investigate each person's degree of Radical Freedom. Start by studying the Radical Freedom website together, reading the passages out loud and discussing the ideas. Then get into groups of 4 and spend 15 minutes focusing on one person at a time to assess - on a scale from 1 to 10 - each person's preparedness for Radical Reality. Write the numbers down in their Beep! Book.

      Radical Freedom is only one of the conditions needed.

      Add up the 10 scores for each person and you will have a number between 10 and 100, which equates to a number between 10% and 100% prepared. Nobody is 100% prepared for Radical Reality. If you arrive at that number, you have been deceived - probably by your Box and Gremlins - and you go back to start over at zero...

      1. The degree to which their Compass of Reality is calibrated.
      2. The degree to which they have become Unhookable.
      3. The degree to which they have exited Reactivity.
      4. The degree to which the have healed their Technopenuriaphobia.
      5. The degree to which they have Become Money and are delivering their Nonmaterial Value.
      6. The degree to which they have learned to Cavitate Space, Set Context, and Hold Space for Archiarchy in the world.
      7. The degree to which they can Inner Navigate their Feelings, Emotions, Egostates, Gremlin, and Hidden Competing Commitments.
      8. The degree to which they have left the ping-pong addiction between the pressure to stay in a Fantasy World, and the collapse of sliding into their Swamp. To what degree can they actually Hit Bottom and stay there?
      9. The degree to which their Survival Strategy is left in the past, and their Box is Optional.
      10. The degree to which they have achieved Radical Freedom.

      After you make this 10 point assessment for each person in your Possibility Team, it will be painfully clear what each person's next steps could be. Use this Clarity to see if there might already be Teams of people working on taking the next steps together. Then divide up and for the next 7 days, radically support each other to succeed in taking at least the first next step. Report on your successes and learnings at your next Possibility Team meeting.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.13 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      THINK ABOUT TAKING RADICAL RESPONSIBILITY FOR ENTERING RADICAL REALITY

      Matrix Code RADREALI.14

      Radical Reality may not be a pretty sight. In fact, it may be shockingly disgusting, embarrassing, madening, even scary. It may cause you tidal waves of grief to see what is really going on in the world, and who is causing it to be this way. There is so much unconscious and unconsciounable 'evil' being created in the world. Why? It is the best those people can do. They may not be aware of the consequences of organizing governments using hierarchical power structure. (The consequences are that the governments become top-heavy with psychopathic personaly disorders.)

      This experiment is personal. It is not done at your Possibility Team.

      Take a 2 hour walk, alone, either in the city or in the countryside or forest. This walk is about making a decision.

      The decision is about where you will you plant your Point Of Origin.

      Your Point Of Origin is where you are energetically connected to the Context of your life. It looks like a gigantic brown-colored carrot, sunk deep into your familiar Level of Responsibility.

      Your familiar Level of Responsibility is the Level of Responsibility handed down to you by your parents, your uninspected culture, and your belief systems.

      You automatically adopted this Level of Responsibility as part of your childhood Survival Strategy. Now, due to the Matrix you have built and the Practices you have adopted, you get a choice about this. You now get to Choose the Level of Responsibility you will be living in on the spectrum from None, Child Level, Adolescent Level, Adult Level, High Level, and Radical Responsibility.

      None of these Levels is right or wrong. None of them are good or bad. But each Level has its consequences, and you cannot avoid the consequences of the Level of Responsibility you Choose to live in.

      (Choosing is one of your 3 Powers as a Human Being. See if you can use that power consciously.)

      During this Decision Walk, what you get to Choose about is taking Responsibility for the Level of Responsibility being taken in every Space you are in from now on for the rest of your life.

      Your Choice recognizes that you support the Values of every Gameworld in which you participate.

      Your Choice recognizes that if you are not consciously Holding Space for the Space you are in, then your Gremlin is in charge of your life, holding onto the secret Shadow Purpose of playing out the Victim role in a Low Drama, ready to turn it around in an instant to get Revenge.

      Take these sentences with you on your Decision Walk.

      Decide which Level of Responsibility you will live in. It is an Experiment.

      No one can Choose this for you.

      More interestingly, no one can stop you from Choosing this.

      After you return from your Decision Walk, write on the inside of the front cover of your Beep! Book the date, the place where you are on Earth, and the Declaration: "I (your full passport name) Choose (which Level) Responsibility."

      You do not need to tell anyone about your Choice. The evidence will be obvious. But you may need to learn how to implement the Practices of your Choice. Learn swiftly and with dilligence. Learn it well. The Universe and E.C.C.O. are watching you closely.

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.14 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      WELCOME THE ARCHETYPAL INFLUENCES OF E.C.C.O., YOUR BRIGHT PRINCIPLES, AND YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE IN YOUR LIFE - BEGIN YOUR QUEST

      Matrix Code RADREALI.15

      For aeons the Universe has been waiting for Human Beings to grow up enough to enter the Archetypal Domains. Adulthood Initiations have been banned from modern culture since its inception some 10,000 years ago at the dawn of civilization when the psychopaths took over the hierarchies and stopped them in order to avoid being detected. So many Potentials have been left dormant, un-fostered, un-liberated, even unseen. They wait without filters for whoever might find them and bring them to life. Fortunately, there is you, a foundling person, located on some piece of land on Earth, starting on your Adulthood Path. Yay!

      This Experiment is to Propose to your Possibility Team to read through the Your Quest StartOver.xyz website out loud together and study the ideas and offerings. Then go around the Circle and reveal to the others what you think Your Quest might be. What have you always been up to? Where are you being drawn to explore and create? Who else is on your Team? Where might you be going together in terms of bringing new human potentials to life?

      The world needs you now, perhaps more than ever before. It needs you vitally alive, empowered, out there on the Edge, exploring, doing your work, as wild it can be.

      You are an Edgeworker. Your Quest happens just over the Edge at your feet. Will you go on Your Quest? It is a 'yes' or 'no' question.

      What is the burning Quest-Ion at your Center, dragging you out of bed in the morning, throwing you into life with full enthusiasm and commitment? State your Quest-Ion to your Possibility Team.

      However it seems to be formulated now, write it down in your Beep! Book, and announce it to the world in whatever ways you can: articles, websites, videos, WorkTalks.

      The point is that you figure out where you are going first, before you find out who you are going there with. Your Quest awaits you!

      After completing this experiment, please enter Matrix Code RADREALI.15 in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayeronline-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate yourpoint of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what youthink about. Your thoughtware is what you useto think with. When you change your thoughtware,you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring uptransformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade yourthoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points wewill change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading thiswhole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code RADREALI.00 to log yourMatrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
